1 / 7

Design Thinking

The Derma Project

Ideation Phase

Participants

• Uday Madankar (PRN: 202501030039)

• Samarth Thonge (PRN: 202501030027)

POV STATEMENT

Our Point of View, framed from the user's perspective:

"A dermatology patient trying to manage their skin condition on a tight budget needs a simple, guided digital platform to book appointments, track their treatment progress, and discover affordable generic alternatives to expensive branded prescriptions — because the current manual, paper-based system is disorganized, and patients are unaware they are overpaying for medicines due to doctor brand tie-ups."

BRAINSTORMING

"How Might We…" questions to spark ideas:

HMW make appointment booking faster and paperless?
HMW help patients track their skin progress easily?
HMW alert patients to cheaper medicine options?
HMW reduce the patient's monthly medicine cost?
HMW digitize the clinic's patient history records?
HMW make medicine info easy to understand?
HMW remind patients about follow-up visits?
HMW build patient trust in generic medicines?

ALTERNATIVE SOLUTIONS

Rejected ✗

Solution A: Paper Upgrade

Improve the physical register with printed templates and color-coded files.

Still prone to loss, requires manual effort, doesn't address medicine cost problem.

Partial ⚡

Solution B: WhatsApp Bot

Use a WhatsApp chatbot for appointment reminders and prescription sharing.

Accessible, but no treatment tracking or generic medicine intelligence built in.

Chosen ✓

Solution C: Derma App

A dedicated mobile app for booking, progress photo tracking, and prescription analysis.

Addresses all three identified gaps. Scalable and user-friendly.

CRAZY 8s

8 rapid feature ideas generated in 8 minutes:

📅 Digital Appointment Calendar
📸 Skin Progress Photo Timeline
💊 Generic Medicine Finder
🔔 Visit Reminder Notifications
💰 Medicine Price Comparator
📋 Digital Prescription Store
📊 Treatment Analytics Dashboard
🤝 Verified Generic Pharmacy Locator

SCAMPER APPLICATION

S Substitute: Substitute the handwritten register with a cloud-based digital database.
C Combine: Combine appointment booking, photo tracking, and medicine info in one app.
A Adapt: Adapt medicine database APIs to identify generic equivalents by active ingredient.
M Modify: Modify the physical patient file into a digital treatment timeline with photo overlays.
P Put to another use: The platform can be adapted for other specialist clinics (orthopedic, dental) later.
E Eliminate: Eliminate the need for patients to physically carry and manage their history files.
R Reverse: Instead of the doctor recommending medicines, let the patient discover alternatives first.

FINAL IDEA

The Derma App

A mobile-first platform that digitizes appointment booking, provides a skin condition progress tracker with photo timelines, and features an intelligent generic medicine suggester — empowering patients to manage their dermatology care affordably and efficiently.
